use_cases: Creating ambient aurora-style backgrounds for landing pages and hero sections
Adding soft gradient glow effects to full-page layouts
Providing atmospheric visual depth without interactive elements
Serving as a decorative backdrop for content containers
ai_summary: A full-screen background component featuring multiple layered radial gradients that create an aurora dream-like glow effect. Uses soft purple, yellow, pink, and blue color stops positioned at corners to generate ambient lighting atmosphere. Designed as a decorative wrapper that fills the viewport with gradient styling.
